effects.effect: Target a [Raptor] Vivosaur you control; apply Quicken to that Vivosaur.

effects.name: Decieving Call
effects.effect: During your Action Phase: you can place this unrested Vivosaur into your FP Zone; play 1 [Raptor] Vivosaur from your deck into that Vivosaur Zone, rested.

effects.name: Fierce Combo
effects.effect: Target 1 other rested [Raptor] Vivosaur you control; unrest it.
